rows.description: Line items for each material bin within a batch

totals.description: Aggregated metrics for the current batch

semantics: The report iterates over each recipe (batch). For each batch, it expands the 12 bin columns into 12 rows. It calculates the variance between set and actual weights. Totals are computed per batch. Date filters restrict the batches included in the report.
transformations: Unpivot 12 bin columns (content, sp, act) into a single row structure per bin.
Calculate row-level error as Actual - Set.
Calculate row-level error percentage as (Actual - Set) / Set * 100.
Aggregate sums for Set, Actual, and Error weights per batch.
Calculate batch error percentage as Sum(Error) / Sum(Set) * 100.
